channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump says US-Iran peace deal is complete, but difficult questions remain
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Markets rally on US-Iran deal as both sides confirm it is genuine. Trump says oil will flow and he never cared about regime change
item.description: Deal with the Islamic Republic of Iran is now complete. Congratulations to all!

item.title: Meet Gwynne Shotwell, the engineer-turned-COO who runs SpaceX in platform heels and is now worth over $2 billion
item.description: I need more data than Elon does to make a decision, Gwynne Shotwell once said.

item.title: Animoca Brands cofounder Yat Siu says Asia will merge AI and blockchain before the West
item.description: "In Asia, we don't have this problem since we're much more comfortable with money."
